title: Vacancy for Real Estate Agent at Sobha Developers Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Real Estate Agent at Sobha Developers Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Sobha Developers Holdings Services is actively seeking a talented and motivated Real Estate Agent to join our dynamic team in Rajkot. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Sobha Developers Holdings Services:
Sobha Developers Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sobha Developers Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
